column8: We don't know anything about the problem. (information) We don't______________about the problem.
column9: Is it okay if I have some cheese? (bit) Is it okay if I have_______________cheese?
column10: There's only a little coffee left in the jar. (much) There____________coffee left in the jar.
column11: I try not to drink too much Coca-Cola in a week. (cans) I try not to drink too____________of Coca-Cola in a week.
column12: Would you like some more chocolate? (piece)Would you like____________chocolate?
column13: I don't want a lot of cream on my strawberries. (cream) I only want____________on my strawberries.
